session.text: [Developer Experience Features] Feature #33: [useBrand Hook] React hook to access current brand information Verification: Returns brand name, version; Returns whether brand is loaded; Updates on brand change Criteria: Manual verification required

task.text: Implement: [useBrand Hook] React hook to access current brand information Verification: Returns brand name, version; Returns whether brand is loaded; Updates on brand change

history.text: [Testing] Feature #14: Implement test Generator agent that converts plans to Playwright/Cypress code Criteria: Generated tests execute successfully against target UI
Implement: Implement test Generator agent that converts plans to Playwright/Cypress code

[Core System Features] Feature #3: [Brand Kit Interface] Standard interface (BrandKitExport) that all brand kits must implement Verification: TypeScript interface exported for brand kit authors; Clear documentation of required vs optional fields; Validation against interface at load time Criteria: Manual verification required

Implement: [Brand Kit Interface] Standard interface (BrandKitExport) that all brand kits must implement Verification: TypeScript interface exported for brand kit authors; Clear documentation of required vs optional fields; Validation against interface at load time

[Core System Features] Feature #4: [Dynamic Import System] Lazy loading of brand kits using dynamic imports to avoid bundle bloat Verification: Brand kit code is NOT in main bundle; Dynamic import() used for brand kit loading; Separate chunk created for brand kit Criteria: Manual verification required

Implement: [Dynamic Import System] Lazy loading of brand kits using dynamic imports to avoid bundle bloat Verification: Brand kit code is NOT in main bundle; Dynamic import() used for brand kit loading; Separate chunk created for brand kit

[Core System Features] Feature #5: [Token Normalization] Adapter layer that normalizes brand kit tokens to internal format Verification: Brand kit tokens converted to internal DesignTokens format; Missing optional tokens filled with defaults; Consistent token structure regardless of source Criteria: Manual verification required

Implement: [Token Normalization] Adapter layer that normalizes brand kit tokens to internal format Verification: Brand kit tokens converted to internal DesignTokens format; Missing optional tokens filled with defaults; Consistent token structure regardless of source

[Core System Features] Feature #6: [Backward Compatibility] Existing code using built-in theming works without modification Verification: No breaking changes to existing API; Existing theme presets continue to work; No required configuration changes for existing projects Criteria: Manual verification required

Implement: [Backward Compatibility] Existing code using built-in theming works without modification Verification: No breaking changes to existing API; Existing theme presets continue to work; No required configuration changes for existing projects

[Configuration Features] Feature #7: [Config File Support] Support frontend.config.ts, .js, .json, .mjs formats Verification: TypeScript config file supported; JavaScript config file supported; JSON config file supported; ESM config file supported Criteria: Manual verification required

Implement: [Config File Support] Support frontend.config.ts, .js, .json, .mjs formats Verification: TypeScript config file supported; JavaScript config file supported; JSON config file supported; ESM config file supported

[Configuration Features] Feature #8: [defineFrontendConfig Helper] Type-safe configuration helper function with IntelliSense Verification: Helper function exported; Full TypeScript types provided; IntelliSense works in all major editors Criteria: Manual verification required

Implement: [defineFrontendConfig Helper] Type-safe configuration helper function with IntelliSense Verification: Helper function exported; Full TypeScript types provided; IntelliSense works in all major editors

[Configuration Features] Feature #9: [Brand Package Specification] brand.package field to specify brand kit package name Verification: brand.package accepts npm package names; Package name validated at build time; Clear error if package not found Criteria: Manual verification required

Implement: [Brand Package Specification] brand.package field to specify brand kit package name Verification: brand.package accepts npm package names; Package name validated at build time; Clear error if package not found

[Configuration Features] Feature #10: [Theme Preset Selection] theme.preset field to select built-in presets (default, blue, green, violet) Verification: All 4 built-in presets selectable; Type-safe preset names; Invalid preset name shows error Criteria: Manual verification required

Implement: [Theme Preset Selection] theme.preset field to select built-in presets (default, blue, green, violet) Verification: All 4 built-in presets selectable; Type-safe preset names; Invalid preset name shows error

[Configuration Features] Feature #11: [Custom Theme Options] theme.custom field for creating themes from hue/saturation Verification: Custom hue value accepted (0-360); Saturation level accepted (low/medium/high); OKLCH toggle supported Criteria: Manual verification required

Implement: [Custom Theme Options] theme.custom field for creating themes from hue/saturation Verification: Custom hue value accepted (0-360); Saturation level accepted (low/medium/high); OKLCH toggle supported

[Configuration Features] Feature #12: [Zero-Config Default] Works out-of-box with no config file (uses default preset) Verification: No config file required to start; Default preset applied automatically; No errors when config file missing Criteria: Manual verification required

Implement: [Zero-Config Default] Works out-of-box with no config file (uses default preset) Verification: No config file required to start; Default preset applied automatically; No errors when config file missing

[Brand Kit Interface Features] Feature #13: [Meta Information] Brand kit must export meta with name, version, description Verification: meta.name required; meta.version required (semver); meta.description optional Criteria: Manual verification required
Implement: [Meta Information] Brand kit must export meta with name, version, description Verification: meta.name required; meta.version required (semver); meta.description optional

[Brand Kit Interface Features] Feature #14: [Color Primitives] Brand kit must export 12-step color scales (primary, accent, neutral) Verification: 12-step scale for primary color; 12-step scale for accent color; 12-step scale for neutral color Criteria: Manual verification required

Implement: [Color Primitives] Brand kit must export 12-step color scales (primary, accent, neutral) Verification: 12-step scale for primary color; 12-step scale for accent color; 12-step scale for neutral color

[Brand Kit Interface Features] Feature #15: [Semantic Colors] Brand kit must export semantic color mappings (background, foreground, etc.) Verification: background, foreground defined; primary, primaryForeground defined; All shadcn/ui semantic colors supported Criteria: Manual verification required

Implement: [Semantic Colors] Brand kit must export semantic color mappings (background, foreground, etc.) Verification: background, foreground defined; primary, primaryForeground defined; All shadcn/ui semantic colors supported

[Brand Kit Interface Features] Feature #16: [Light Theme Colors] Brand kit must export light mode semantic colors Verification: Complete light theme colors; Colors optimized for light backgrounds; Contrast ratios meet WCAG AA Criteria: Manual verification required
Implement: [Light Theme Colors] Brand kit must export light mode semantic colors Verification: Complete light theme colors; Colors optimized for light backgrounds; Contrast ratios meet WCAG AA

[Brand Kit Interface Features] Feature #17: [Dark Theme Colors] Brand kit must export dark mode semantic colors Verification: Complete dark theme colors; Colors optimized for dark backgrounds; Contrast ratios meet WCAG AA Criteria: Manual verification required
Implement: [Dark Theme Colors] Brand kit must export dark mode semantic colors Verification: Complete dark theme colors; Colors optimized for dark backgrounds; Contrast ratios meet WCAG AA

[Brand Kit Interface Features] Feature #18: [Typography Scale] Brand kit must export typography (font families, sizes, weights, line heights) Verification: Font families (sans, mono, optional display); Font sizes (xs to 9xl); Font weights (100-900); Line heights for each size Criteria: Manual verification required

Implement: [Typography Scale] Brand kit must export typography (font families, sizes, weights, line heights) Verification: Font families (sans, mono, optional display); Font sizes (xs to 9xl); Font weights (100-900); Line heights for each size

[Brand Kit Interface Features] Feature #19: [Spacing Scale] Brand kit must export spacing scale (8px grid or custom) Verification: Complete spacing scale (0-96); Consistent grid system; Rem-based values Criteria: Manual verification required
Implement: [Spacing Scale] Brand kit must export spacing scale (8px grid or custom) Verification: Complete spacing scale (0-96); Consistent grid system; Rem-based values

[Brand Kit Interface Features] Feature #20: [Radius Scale] Brand kit must export border radius scale Verification: Radius values (none to full); Consistent naming (sm, md, lg, etc.); Default radius specified Criteria: Manual verification required
Implement: [Radius Scale] Brand kit must export border radius scale Verification: Radius values (none to full); Consistent naming (sm, md, lg, etc.); Default radius specified

[Brand Kit Interface Features] Feature #21: [Shadow Scale] Brand kit must export shadow/elevation scale Verification: Shadow levels (sm to 2xl); Inner shadow supported; None option available Criteria: Manual verification required
Implement: [Shadow Scale] Brand kit must export shadow/elevation scale Verification: Shadow levels (sm to 2xl); Inner shadow supported; None option available

[Loading & Resolution Features] Feature #22: [NPM Package Loading] Load brand kit from NPM package name (e.g., @platxa/brand-kit) Verification: Standard npm package names work; Scoped packages work (@org/name); Package must be installed Criteria: Manual verification required

Implement: [NPM Package Loading] Load brand kit from NPM package name (e.g., @platxa/brand-kit) Verification: Standard npm package names work; Scoped packages work (@org/name); Package must be installed

[Loading & Resolution Features] Feature #23: [Build-Time Resolution] Resolve brand kit at build time (Vite/Webpack plugin) Verification: Brand kit resolved during build; CSS generated at build time; No runtime resolution overhead Criteria: Manual verification required
Implement: [Build-Time Resolution] Resolve brand kit at build time (Vite/Webpack plugin) Verification: Brand kit resolved during build; CSS generated at build time; No runtime resolution overhead

[Loading & Resolution Features] Feature #24: [Error Recovery] Graceful error handling when brand kit fails to load Verification: App doesn't crash on load failure; Fallback to default theme; Error logged with details Criteria: Manual verification required
Implement: [Error Recovery] Graceful error handling when brand kit fails to load Verification: App doesn't crash on load failure; Fallback to default theme; Error logged with details

Implement: [CSS Variable Generation] Generate CSS custom properties from brand tokens Verification: All semantic colors as CSS vars; Spacing as CSS vars; Typography as CSS vars
